database_info.name: Gate Barrier Selection Theory - Standards Based
database_info.purpose: Engineering design tool for gate barrier system selection

1_barrier_series_selection.principle: Barrier series is selected based on traffic volume, speed requirement, and feature needs

comparison.best_for: Small parking lots, residential, low traffic (<200 cycles/day)
comparison.note: Sold as barrier body only — boom pole ordered separately

comparison.motor: AC with DC frequency conversion (4B0) / DC (420)
comparison.features: Hand wheel, 99 speed shifts, delayed closing, optional auto-open on power fail
comparison.best_for: Commercial parking, offices, medium traffic (200-500 cycles/day)

comparison.features: Anti-condensation, auto lock, RS-485, traffic signal light, strip light, anti-fall radar support
comparison.best_for: Toll stations, high-traffic parking, commercial complexes (500+ cycles/day)

2_boom_pole_length_selection.principle: Boom pole length must cover the full lane width with margin

guidelines.note: Adjustable pole for flexible site conditions

boom_pole_types.feature: Rubber cushion, absorbs impact if hit by vehicle
LED strip for visibility at night

clearance_height.note: Ensure boom pole in raised position clears tallest expected vehicle

3_left_vs_right_selection.principle: Boom pole direction is determined by barrier position relative to traffic flow

rules.right_hand_R: Barrier on RIGHT side of lane (driver's perspective approaching) → boom extends LEFT across lane → use -R model
rules.left_hand_L: Barrier on LEFT side of lane → boom extends RIGHT across lane → use -L model
rules.switchable: 5 Series (DS-TMG520) boom direction is switchable on site. 4 Series (DS-TMG4B0) direction is also adjustable.

4_safety_system_design.principle: Gate barriers must have safety devices to prevent injury to people and damage to vehicles

mandatory_safety.standard: EN 12453:2017 - Safety in use of power operated doors and gates
requirements: Limitation of force (Type A: max 400N contact force for 1s, or max 150N sustained)
Emergency release mechanism (hand wheel for manual operation)

hikvision_safety_options.function: Detects pedestrians and vehicles under boom, prevents closing
Infrared safety beam, detects presence in boom path
Rubber cushion absorbs impact if boom hits vehicle
Raise/lower boom manually during power failure

4_safety_system_design.recommendation: For public parking: radar (DS-TMG035) + IR beam (DS-TMG110) recommended. For private/industrial: IR beam minimum.

5_power_and_electrical_design.principle: Each barrier gate requires dedicated power with proper protection

requirements.circuit_sizing: Each barrier on dedicated 10A circuit with 30mA RCD/GFCI
requirements.cable_specification: Minimum 1.5mm² copper for power, shielded cable for RS-485/signal
requirements.grounding: Protective earth bonding to barrier housing (metal casing)
requirements.ups_recommendation: UPS not typically required — hand wheel provides manual override on power fail

signal_wiring.induction_loop: 2.5mm² PVC insulated loop wire embedded in road surface, typically 1.5m x 2m rectangle
signal_wiring.ir_beam: Low voltage signal cable, max 10m between T/R pair
signal_wiring.radar: Connected via barrier gate reserved mounting hole, powered from barrier

6_foundation_and_civil_works.standard: Manufacturer Installation Guide / Local Building Code
6_foundation_and_civil_works.principle: Barrier gate requires proper foundation for stability and cable routing

foundation_min_dimensions_mm.note: Minimum concrete pad for barrier mounting

requirements.anchor_bolts: M12 or M16 expansion bolts, minimum 4 per barrier
requirements.cable_conduit: 50mm PVC conduit embedded in concrete for power and signal cables
requirements.drainage: Foundation must have drainage slope — water must not pool around barrier base

island_height_mm.note: Raised island protects barrier from vehicle impact

induction_loop_installation.sealant: Bitumen or loop sealant to protect wire in road cut

7_integration_with_parking_system.principle: Barrier gates integrate with ANPR cameras, access control, and parking management software

integration_components.function: Automatic license plate recognition for entry/exit
Vehicle presence detection for trigger and safety
Parking management software — payment, reporting, integration

8_environmental_and_ip_rating.principle: Barrier must withstand outdoor environmental conditions

requirements.ip_rating: IP54 (dust protected, splash-proof) — standard for outdoor barriers
requirements.anti_condensation: 5 Series includes motor heating to prevent lube freezing in cold climates
requirements.anti_corrosion: CRS housing with powder coating. Consider additional anti-corrosion treatment in coastal/humid environments.
requirements.wind_load: Boom poles >4m may require wind load consideration — consult structural engineer for exposed locations
requirements.uv_resistance: Housing paint rated for outdoor UV exposure

9_compliance_standards.principle: Gate barriers must comply with safety and electromagnetic standards

standards.scope: Safety in use of power operated doors, gates, and barriers — force limitation, safety devices
Test methods for power operated doors and gates
Mechanical aspects — requirements for power operated doors and gates
Safety devices for power operated doors and gates — requirements and test methods
EU machinery safety (if barrier is considered a machine)

10_traffic_flow_capacity.principle: Barrier speed and cycle time determine maximum vehicle throughput
10_traffic_flow_capacity.note: Actual throughput depends on access control processing time (ANPR/card read), payment time, and traffic patterns. Values above assume continuous flow.
